articles.one_line: US, Ecuador launch joint anti-drug operation

articles.title: Fact check: Debunking claims in the US-Israel war with Iran
articles.summary:
Videos claiming to show the US–Israel–Iran war are flooding social media.
And while many look dramatic or terrifying, a lot of them are fake, AI‑generated, or taken completely out of context.
articles.one_line: Fact check: Debunking claims in the US-Israel war with Iran

articles.title: Iran war: Why is Russia not coming to Tehran's aid?
